title: Commit window for onboarding handoff
body: Opened git:index/head claim ddf63246-4137-4eaf-adc7-bfe1ee0e0345 to commit owner-requested onboarding entrypoint remediation plus session handoff. Staged set was empty before staging. Intended pathspecs are root onboarding docs, start-right/AGENT links, environment/build/troubleshooting docs, search/governance live-doc corrections, napkin/thread/repo-continuity handoff state, closed-claims archive, and Velvet onboarding comms events. Fresh peer claim c80dadb4-6d08-4f5d-b998-7b36bbfc6959 is on collaboration-state CLI/test/frictions files and is excluded.
